name: Coinswap Maker Dashboard
description: Coinswap Maker Dashboard is a web-based management interface for running a Coinswap maker node.
Makers are liquidity providers in the Coinswap privacy protocol — they route Bitcoin through their wallets to break transaction history, earning fees in the process.
The dashboard replaces the command-line maker-cli with an intuitive browser-based UI.

You can create and manage multiple maker instances, configure maker settings, manage hot wallets, create fidelity bonds (time-locked Bitcoin deposits that prove commitment), and monitor maker activity — all from your browser.

app_page_content.heading: Getting Started
content: Open the dashboard and create a maker instance.
Configure Bitcoin RPC credentials to connect to your local Bitcoin node.
Fund the maker wallet and create a fidelity bond to start accepting swaps.
Your maker will be reachable via Tor at: {APP_TOR_ADDRESS}
